ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who performed the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the song */,
  "year_released" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "added_to_platform" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the platform */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the song */,
  "top_year" INTEGER /* The year the song was most popular */,
  "artist_type" TEXT /* Type of the artist (e.g., Solo, Duo, Band) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_type" TEXT /* Type of the artist (e.g., Solo, Duo, Band) */,
  "artist_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "artist_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's profile image */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "monthly_listeners_count" INTEGER /* Number of monthly listeners the artist has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "audio_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of audio features */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song these features belong to */,
  "bpm" REAL /* Beats per minute of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy level of the song */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness level of the song */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the song */,
  "tempo_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the tempo detection */,
  "key_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the key detection */,
  "mode_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the mode detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_popularity" (
  "popularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each popularity metric */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song this popularity metric belongs to */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Overall popularity score of the song */,
  "top_year" INTEGER /* The year the song was most popular */,
  "monthly_listeners_count" INTEGER /* Number of monthly listeners the song has */,
  "streaming_platform" TEXT /* Streaming platform where the song is most popular */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("popularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_popularity_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_data" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "listening_history" TEXT /* List of songs the user has listened to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "playlist_description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "playlist_type" TEXT /* Type of playlist (e.g., user-generated, system-generated) */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user or system that created the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist song */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the playlist this song belongs to */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "addition_date" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_performance" (
  "artist_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist performance metric */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist this performance metric belongs to */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the artist */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the artist */,
  "monthly_listeners_count" INTEGER /* Number of monthly listeners the artist has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_performance_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)
